title: Case-Feature Bundle Public Summary v0

sources.label: Multiple Myeloma Synthetic Case-To-Cure Pipeline v0
MRD And Relapse Measurement Glossary v0

limitations: Not a fillable public case schema.
Does not provide expanded-access guidance for any person.
Does not claim that multiple myeloma has been cured.
Does not permit real case upload, patient-identifying data, raw records, free-text notes, dates tied to a person, or patient-specific candidate options.
Field groups are shape categories for public planning and do not form a complete clinical ontology.
Any real case workflow requires private governance, consent, privacy review, clinical ownership, and audit controls outside this repo.
